rule_summary: current breakout rule | regime must be Risk-on or Selective risk-on | sector ETF must be above 20DMA and 50DMA
current breakout rule | regime must be Risk-on | sector ETF must be above 20DMA and 50DMA
first confirmed close above prior 20-day high | close > 20DMA > 50DMA | RS 20D > 0 and RS 60D > 0 | ATR percent <= 6% | within 15% of 52-week high
supportive sector-confirmed breakout | RS 20D >= 3% | RS 60D >= 2% | stock outperformed sector over 20D | extension vs 20DMA <= 8% | ATR percent <= 5.5%
supportive sector-confirmed breakout | RS 10D >= 1% | RS 20D >= 4% | RS 60D >= 3% | extension vs 20DMA <= 6% | ATR percent <= 5% | within 10% of 52-week high
